query: SELECT gameId, side, pitcherName, pitcherHand, kProj, kLine, kPer9, pOver, pUnder, modelOverOdds, modelUnderOdds, verdict, bestSide FROM mlb_strikeout_props WHERE gameId IN (2250007, 2250008, 2250009) ORDER BY gameId, side;
